# HelpMarq

> HelpMarq is a feedback marketplace where project owners get structured, honest feedback from matched reviewers within 48 hours. Free during beta — no credit card required.

## What is HelpMarq?

HelpMarq is a platform where builders, founders, students, and creators submit any project — websites, apps, pitch decks, designs, business ideas, documents — and receive structured, multi-perspective feedback from matched reviewers.

Reviewers are matched to projects by category and expertise. They deliver feedback through structured templates, ensuring responses are specific and actionable rather than vague opinions. Every reviewer has a public rated profile.

## Core problem HelpMarq solves

Most builders cannot get honest, structured feedback on their work:
- Friends are too kind and say "looks great" instead of pointing out real issues
- Forums (Reddit, communities) give random, unstructured, unaccountable responses
- Hiring consultants costs $100–500/hour and is unrealistic for early-stage projects

HelpMarq provides a structured alternative: matched, rated, accountable reviewers delivering templated feedback within 48 hours.

## How it works

1. **Submit** — Upload a URL, file, or description. Add focus areas.
2. **Get matched** — The platform matches the project with relevant reviewers: experts, practitioners, and everyday users who mirror the real target audience.
3. **Receive feedback** — Reviewers deliver structured feedback within 48 hours through rated templates.
4. **Improve** — Rate reviewers, apply feedback, iterate.

## Who is it for?

**Project owners**: Students, indie founders, SaaS builders, designers, creators who need real feedback before shipping. Anyone who wants to validate a project without guessing.

**Reviewers**: Professionals and practitioners who want to build a public reputation and earn XP by giving structured feedback on real projects.

## Project types accepted

Websites, landing pages, mobile apps, SaaS products, pitch decks, business ideas, design mockups, brand identities, written documents, presentations.

## Reviewer tier system

Reviewers earn XP for each review based on project complexity and quality rating from the project owner.

- **Bronze** — 0 XP — Starting tier
- **Silver** — 500 XP — Access to wider project range
- **Gold** — 1,500 XP — Priority matching to high-value projects
- **Platinum** — 5,000 XP — Elite status, first access to new features

Higher-tier reviewers get priority matching to better projects. The system rewards quality and consistency.

## Key differentiators vs alternatives

| Feature | HelpMarq | Reddit/Forums | Friends | Consultants |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Structured format | Always | Never | Never | Sometimes |
| Reviewer accountability | Rated profiles | Anonymous | None | Contract only |
| Multiple perspectives | 3 reviewer types | Random | Biased | Single view |
| 48-hour turnaround | Guaranteed | No | No | Depends |
| Matched to project type | Smart matching | None | None | You find them |
| Cost | Free in beta | Free | Free | $100–500+/hr |

## Founding Reviewer program

Early users who sign up before the official launch date receive a permanent "Founding Reviewer" badge on their profile. This badge is exclusive and will not be available after the launch window closes.

## Frequently asked questions

**Is HelpMarq free?**
Yes. Completely free during beta for both owners and reviewers. No credit card required.

**What projects can be submitted?**
Websites, apps, pitch decks, business ideas, design mockups, documents — anything a builder has created.

**How fast is feedback delivered?**
Within 48 hours of reviewer matching.

**Who reviews projects?**
A mix of professionals, practitioners, and everyday users matched by project category.

**How is this different from forums?**
Reviewers are rated, matched by category, and use structured templates. Their public profile is at stake with every review.
